name: ChatVLSC MCP recent change and access review

recent_local_changes.summary: Added a validate-only deploy gate command that checks required Wrangler routes, package scripts, local Worker source markers, secret environment variable presence as booleans, and Wrangler auth state without attempting a deploy or storing raw auth output.
validation: pnpm run test:deploy-gate returned ok=true, deploy_ready=false, status=blocked_not_authenticated, passed=5, failed=0
Deploy gate validator stores_secret_values=false and stores_wrangler_whoami_output=false
No deploy was attempted

recent_local_changes.summary: Removed local archive and token-entry filename assumptions from Cloudflare Access and Worker secret import flows. Added validate-only access-plan script coverage and made remote Cloudflare checks prefer env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.
validation: pnpm run test:access-plan passed in validate-only mode with no token supplied
Secret importer validate-only mode returns not_checked_token_env_missing and stores_secret_values=false when env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is absent
Strict public secret-source scan no longer finds local archive names or token-entry filenames

referenced_thread_evidence.title: Add Zapier MCP server
evidence: Zapier MCP server URL https://mcp.zapier.com/api/v1/connect was added to WARP/workspace MCP configuration.
Earlier in that thread, Zapier action tools were able to read Microsoft Graph application data through Entra raw request actions.
Later in that thread, Zapier schema probing/execution and Notion update attempts were blocked by workspace credits.
A raw OpenAI key appeared in that thread; it must not be repeated or reused from chat and should be rotated or handled only through the secure OpenAI Platform connector.

workspace_access_strategy.target: Use the fewest workspaces possible while preserving auditability and least privilege.
recommended_consolidation: Keep ChatVLSC MCP operational evidence in the existing Notion review page, Airtable review base, Linear THE-5, and public sanitized GitHub mirror.
Do not create additional workspaces for the same users until the canonical domain identities and external aliases are resolved.
Separate human workspace membership from machine/service identities such as ChatVLSC agent users, Cloudflare Access service tokens, Zapier MCP connections, and OpenAI API keys.
Treat api.thevlsc.com/user_role/v1 as the primary ChatVLSC implementation target and mcp.thevlsc.com/v1 as secondary development compatibility.
not_applied: No users were invited or joined to any workspace.
No Cloudflare Access policies, Entra app roles, Slack channels, Airtable records, Notion pages, or OpenAI keys were created in this pass.

secure_access_gates.required_evidence: Access applications covering api.thevlsc.com/user_role/v1*, mcp.thevlsc.com/v1*, and api.thevlsc.com/admin/v1* plus Service Auth policies and service-token credentials stored outside source.
Canonical resolution for chatvlsc@thevlsc.com, redacted_google_alias_candidate or redacted_google_alias_observed, and redacted_domain_gid_identity.
Reauthenticated OpenAI Platform connector and selected organization/project target before key or ChatGPT app work continues.

wrangler deploy succeeds or Cloudflare build/deploy evidence shows local post-2026-07-07 changes live on vlsc-user-role-mcp; current shell is not authenticated and config/chatvlsc/cloudflare-production-deploy.gate.json records the gate.
Zapier MCP authorization and action schema availability in the current session.

secret_handling.policy: Do not repeat, commit, publish, or move raw tokens from chat or thread history. Any previously pasted key should be rotated or handled through the secure connector flow.

next_actions: Resolve identity spelling and membership mismatches in Notion/Airtable before granting access.
Reauthenticate OpenAI Platform connector before any OpenAI key/app target work.
Create or select Cloudflare Access service-token credentials and store them outside source before authenticated MCP production tests.

Run pnpm run test:connectivity -- -UseCloudflareAccessServiceToken and pnpm run test:mcp:production after approved service-token credentials are loaded; the protocol harness now exercises primary ChatVLSC /user_role/v1 for tool calls.
Use config/chatvlsc/tunnel-client-chatvlsc-mcp.profile.example.yaml as the sanitized tunnel-client profile starting point for mcp.thevlsc.com.
Authenticate Wrangler or provide a scoped Cloudflare deploy token outside source, then deploy or trigger a Cloudflare build for vlsc-user-role-mcp.
Update Linear THE-5 with this review result and keep Airtable Stage 2 as In Progress until IDP evidence is complete.
